name: higher_education_governance_near_miss_harbor_lib_eq
premise: A Higher Education Governance response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving higher education governance near miss harbor lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Gideon Navarro
agents.identity: I am Gideon Navarro, accountable for a defensible call in Higher Education Governance when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Camila Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Camila Vasquez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Higher Education Governance.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Gideon Navarro must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Gideon Navarro do?
